subcodes.first_line: I testify to that which God Himself hath testified - that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who speaketh today is verily the Manifestation of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق الیوم انه لمظهر امره لمن
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment
